en: Welcome back to The Night Show with your host, Chortles Collins.
ko: 촐스 콜린스가 진행하는 나이트 쇼에 돌아오신 걸 환영합니다.

en: It's time for another edition of On the Contrary.
Let's take a look at a clip of Senator Potts.
I think Americans would be happy to pay higher taxes
if it means their congressmen get raises.
The most trusted name in late-night comedy news.
ko: 심야 코미디 뉴스에서 가장 신뢰받는 이름.
